# 8.2 Bill Analysis Profiles

Defines the prompt profile catalog for bill analysis: which instruction blocks compose each profile, what stage ordering and weights apply, and what the initial block set covers. Profiles and blocks are stored in GCS ŌĆö this area defines the **contract** (what profiles exist and what they contain), not the prompt text itself.

## Profile Catalog

### Decomposition Profiles

Used by bill-analysis-pipeline (Component 10) during text decomposition step for large bills.

#### `concept-simplification`

Simplifies a group of related bill sections into a coherent summary.

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `general-audience` | 0.9 | Plain language output |
| Context | `concept-group-text` | 1.0 | Placeholder: `{{concept_group_text}}` ŌĆö the grouped sections to simplify |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `concept-summary-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for concept summary output |

Expected input: Subset of bill text (one concept group). Expected output: Concise summary preserving key provisions, dollar amounts, affected parties, and policy mechanisms.

#### `section-classification`

Classifies a bill section by topic/policy area to aid concept grouping.

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Context | `section-text` | 1.0 | Placeholder: `{{section_text}}` ŌĆö the individual section to classify |
| Output | `topic-classification-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema matching `TopicClassificationOutput` (Component 1 ┬¦1.6) |

Expected input: Single section/provision. Expected output: Topic tags with confidence scores for concept grouping.

### Analysis Profiles

Used by bill-analysis-pipeline for three-pass tiered analysis.

#### `pass1-extraction`

Structured extraction, topic classification, and plain language summary. Runs on all bills (Haiku tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `general-audience` | 0.9 | 8th-grade reading level |
| Lens | `policy-area-classifier` | 0.8 | Topic/policy area classification |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments` | 1.0 | `{{bill_concepts}}` = simplified summaries or raw text; `{{amendments}}` = amendment descriptions |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention, factual accuracy |
| Output | `pass1-extraction-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for summary + topics + key points |

Expected output schemas: `BillSummaryOutput` + `TopicClassificationOutput` (Component 1 ┬¦1.6).

#### `pass2-deep-analysis`

Deep analysis: pork detection, impact analysis, stance classification, fiscal estimates. Runs on filtered bills (Sonnet tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `expert-audience` | 0.8 | More detailed/technical output |
| Lens | `fiscal-lens`, `civil-liberties-lens`, `pork-detector` | 0.8 | Multiple analytical lenses (additive) |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments`, `pass1-results` | 1.0 | `{{bill_concepts}}`, `{{amendments}}`, `{{pass1_results}}` = Pass 1 output |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `pass2-deep-analysis-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for pork + impact + stance + fiscal |

Expected output schemas: `PorkDetectionOutput` + `ImpactAnalysisOutput` + `StanceClassificationOutput` + `FiscalEstimateOutput` (Component 1 ┬¦1.6).

Multiple lenses: Each lens adds an analytical focus. `ChainAssembler` (Component 1 ┬¦1.7) merges them into a single stage section. Stage weight applies to all lenses equally.

#### `pass3-ambiguity-resolution`

Ambiguity resolution and cross-bill analysis. Runs only on flagged bills (Opus tier).

| Stage | Blocks | Weight | Purpose |
|-------|--------|--------|---------|
| System | `base-legislative-analyst` | 1.0 | Core analyst role |
| Persona | `expert-audience` | 0.9 | Detailed, nuanced output |
| Lens | `ambiguity-resolver`, `cross-reference-analyzer` | 0.9 | Cross-document reasoning |
| Context | `bill-concepts`, `amendments`, `pass1-results`, `pass2-results`, `related-bills` | 1.0 | All prior analysis + related bills |
| Guardrails | `nonpartisan-constraint`, `accuracy-constraint` | 1.0 | Bias prevention |
| Output | `pass3-resolution-schema` | 1.0 | JSON schema for ambiguity resolution |

### Utility Profiles

Convenience profiles for targeted analysis (not part of standard three-pass flow).

| Profile | Purpose | Blocks |
|---------|---------|--------|
| `summary-only` | Plain language summary only (no classification or deep analysis) | System + Persona(general) + Context(bill-concepts) + Output(summary-schema) |
| `pork-detection` | Targeted pork/rider scan without full deep analysis | System + Persona(expert) + Lens(pork-detector) + Context(bill-concepts) + Output(pork-schema) |

---

## Block Catalog

All blocks stored in GCS as YAML files. This catalog defines the contract (block names, stages, purposes). Actual prompt content lives in GCS.

### System Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `base-legislative-analyst` | Core system prompt establishing analyst role, capabilities, behavioral baseline |

### Persona Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `general-audience` | Plain language at 8th-grade reading level; avoids jargon |
| `expert-audience` | Technical/detailed output; assumes policy expertise |

### Lens Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `policy-area-classifier` | Topic and policy area classification with confidence scores |
| `fiscal-lens` | Fiscal impact analysis: budgets, revenue, CBO-style estimates |
| `civil-liberties-lens` | Civil liberties and constitutional implications |
| `healthcare-lens` | Healthcare policy impacts |
| `pork-detector` | Earmarks, riders, unrelated provisions |
| `ambiguity-resolver` | Identifies and resolves ambiguous or contradictory provisions |
| `cross-reference-analyzer` | Cross-bill interaction analysis |

### Context Stage

Context blocks contain placeholders replaced at runtime by `BillContextInjector` (┬¦8.3).

| Block Name | Placeholder | Injected Content |
|------------|-------------|-----------------|
| `bill-concepts` | `{{bill_concepts}}` | Simplified concept summaries or raw text (short bills) |
| `concept-group-text` | `{{concept_group_text}}` | Single concept group for simplification |
| `section-text` | `{{section_text}}` | Single section for classification |
| `amendments` | `{{amendments}}` | Amendment descriptions |
| `related-bills` | `{{related_bills}}` | Related bill summaries (cross-bill analysis) |
| `pass1-results` | `{{pass1_results}}` | Pass 1 extraction results (Pass 2/3 context) |
| `pass2-results` | `{{pass2_results}}` | Pass 2 analysis results (Pass 3 context) |

### Guardrails Stage

| Block Name | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| `nonpartisan-constraint` | Prohibits partisan language, party-based opinions, political recommendations |
| `accuracy-constraint` | Requires factual citations, distinguishes fact from interpretation, flags uncertainty |

### Output Stage

| Block Name | References Schema |
|------------|------------------|
| `concept-summary-schema` | Concept group summary (decomposition output) |
| `topic-classification-schema` | `TopicClassificationOutput` (┬¦1.6) |
| `pass1-extraction-schema` | `BillSummaryOutput` + `TopicClassificationOutput` (┬¦1.6) |
| `pass2-deep-analysis-schema` | `PorkDetectionOutput` + `ImpactAnalysisOutput` + `StanceClassificationOutput` + `FiscalEstimateOutput` (┬¦1.6) |
| `pass3-resolution-schema` | Ambiguity resolution output |

---

## Block Versioning

All block filenames include semver: `{blockName}-v{major}.{minor}.{patch}.yaml`. Profiles reference blocks by name; version resolved at load time by `BlockLoader` (┬¦8.1). New files created with incremented version; old versions preserved in GCS. `BillPromptEngineConfig.defaultVersion` (┬¦8.1) determines loaded version unless overridden.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| Every profile in catalog has valid YAML definition in test fixtures | Load each profile ŌåÆ deserializes to `PromptProfile` without errors |
| Every profile references only blocks that exist in block catalog | Cross-reference profile `blockNames` against catalog ŌåÆ no missing references |
| Every block in catalog has `stage` matching its directory | Block in `lens/` ŌåÆ `stage == Lens` |
| All context blocks have exactly one placeholder token | Each context block ŌåÆ contains exactly one `{{...}}` token |
| `concept-simplification` profile assembles in correct stage order | Assemble ŌåÆ stages: System, Persona, Context, Guardrails, Output |
| `section-classification` profile has no Persona or Lens stage | Assemble ŌåÆ no Persona or Lens content |
| `pass1-extraction` profile includes all required stages | Assemble ŌåÆ System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output all present |
| `pass2-deep-analysis` profile includes multiple lenses | Assemble ŌåÆ Lens section contains fiscal, civil-liberties, pork-detector |
| `pass2-deep-analysis` includes `pass1-results` context block | Profile chain ŌåÆ Context stage includes `pass1-results` |
| `pass3-ambiguity-resolution` includes `pass1-results` and `pass2-results` | Profile chain ŌåÆ Context stage includes both |
| Utility profiles (`summary-only`, `pork-detection`) are valid | Load each ŌåÆ deserializes correctly |
| No two blocks share same name | Block catalog audit ŌåÆ all names unique |
| No two profiles share same name | Profile catalog audit ŌåÆ all names unique |
| All weights in 0.0-1.0 range | Inspect all profile stage weights ŌåÆ all valid |
